So you imagine like someone, someone has a question that's about some deduction that they heard from a friend and they get to that article and it's really good and it's in depth.

Where then there's a bigger chance of acquiring them, right?

It's like the same topics, just a very different level of depth and a very different voice.

Yeah.

maybe we just do the direct acquisition really, really well and just focus on that.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on GrowthX's progress and align on next steps for Town's content strategy and website development.](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has made significant progress on company context, audience personas, and competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Town to review and provide feedback on company context and audience persona documents](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Content strategy to focus on SMB-targeted vertical-specific topics, enriched with expert insights](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Immediate action to set up blog on current Framer site to start building SEO signals before new site launch](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

## Topics

### Document Review and Feedback

  - [Jean to review company context and audience persona documents](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Writing guidelines to be discussed in more detail next week](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Jean to provide clarification on competitor categorization (tax firms vs. bookkeeping/accounting)](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Approach

  - [GrowthX analyzed 32,000 keywords from competitors, focusing on low-difficulty, high-volume opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Strategy to build foundation with winnable keywords, then tackle more relevant but higher-difficulty topics](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Aim to create a comprehensive "tax library" covering key topics for SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Focus on three content approaches: tax scenarios, tax forms, and vertical-specific insights](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Goal to create engaging content pathways for users to explore related topics](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Content Creation and Differentiation

  - [Plan to incorporate "information gain" in blog posts (e.g., expert interviews, original analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Potential to conduct interviews with Town's tax experts for unique insights](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Target content initially for SMBs, considering vertical-specific opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Acknowledge challenge of creating dual-tone content for partners vs. small business owners](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Decision to focus primarily on direct acquisition content for now](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Website Development and CMS

  - [Current site uses Framer CMS; new site launching in August will use a different CMS](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Jean to provide GrowthX access to current Framer site for immediate content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Plan to set up search console, sitemap, and start publishing content ASAP to build SEO signals](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Content will need to be migrated to new CMS in August, maintaining consistent URLs](https://fathom.video/share/JwFCW7H7pMszqHmxesw4TS_zkiBToPW6?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
